page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m4.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs utilizing the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 31.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.88 GB per core. It includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU allocation of approximately 0.1667 with 4 GB of dedicated VRAM. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, and it features a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for general compute and memory operations. It achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1631.0 and a multi-core score of 8775.0, alongside a stress-ng multi-core CPU performance of 15139.35. The fractional GPU configuration supports lightweight graphics and AI workloads, processing 135M parameter LLM text generation at 198.84 tokens per second. However, resource constraints become evident with larger models; the instance exhibits weak performance on 7B parameter LLM inference, delivering only 8.13 tokens per second for text generation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the fractional GPU allocation allows organizations to access hardware-accelerated resources without the expense of a dedicated full GPU. This makes the instance suitable for entry-level GPU tasks, lightweight LLM inference, ray tracing, and general-purpose workloads that benefit from moderate parallel processing. It is also well-suited for software compilation, database operations, and static web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m4.2xlarge is an x86_64 GPU-accelerated instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B CPU cores operating at 2.9 GHz, 31.0 GB of system memory, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 4 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmark results show average performance across standard compute tasks, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 8775.0 and a stress-ng multi-core score of 15139.35. While highly capable for lightweight AI tasks, such as processing a 135M LLM model at 198.84 tokens per second, it exhibits weak performance on larger 7B models. This instance offers a cost-effective entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads, making it suitable for lightweight model inference, software compilation, ray tracing, and general-purpose applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m4.2xlarge is an x86_64 instance with 8 Intel Xeon cores, 31 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 4 GB VRAM, designed for budget-friendly GPU-accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m4.2xlarge is an x86_64 instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon cores, 31 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 4 GB VRAM.
tagline: An efficient x86_64 virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU acceleration for entry-level parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B CPU cores running at 2.9 GHz
Fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 4 GB of dedicated VRAM
31.0 GB of system memory and 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
No local storage included, requiring external block storage
Optimized for lightweight AI inference, ray tracing, and software compilation
